title: Tax Filing Guide
subtitleRomania: Copy these values into {{portal}} when filing {{form}}
subtitleGeneric: Use these values when filing your tax return
emptySubtitle: No tax calculation loaded. Upload a statement or load a saved calculation first.
taxYearBanner: Guide for tax year 2025 (filing May 2026). The values calculated here are entered in Declarația Unică filed by May 25, 2026 for income earned in 2025. For 2026 income, the tax rate changes to 16% per Law 239/2025. A dedicated guide will be available in 2027.
stepNavigate: Navigate to each section listed below
stepCopyPaste: Click the copy button next to each value and paste it into the matching field
filingDeadline: Filing deadline: {{finalDeadline}}. Early filing by {{earlyDeadline}} for discount.
